# About

## Background
Test user; AI infrastructure engineer; built a thing that did a thing with metric M.

## Story bank
- Shipped feature X in 2 weeks, reduced latency 40%. (use for: infra roles, ai eng)
- Led migration of Y to Z, zero downtime. (use for: senior eng, platform roles)

## Hard rules
- never claim ML PhD; have no PhD.
- never use the phrase "passionate about".
